title: CI: add manpage-crossref checker
body: `hack/podman-commands.sh` keeps finding instances of new podman commands that aren't being properly added to man pages. Could we add this to our CI?

comments.body: @cevich when you have a moment please...
Yes we should add this to CI, probably as part of `gating_task` or `contrib/cirrus/unit_test.sh`.  Yep I'll toss up a PR for this, thx for asking.
